auto_fix_high GetHipQuick Series

Common
Design Issues

The details that separate polished from amateur. Browse, search, and learn — so you stop making the same mistakes.

Issue Severity Guide
Minor
Nobody's calling the design police — but it's worth fixing when you have a moment.
Moderate
This one's noticeable. It won't ruin everything, but it will make people squint.
Major
Stop. Don't publish this yet. Fix it now before your audience does the judging for you.
